title: Antenatal follow-up
uae_applicability: Verified for DoH-licensed antenatal providers in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates; broader UAE application is not asserted.

sections.heading: 1. Standard Scope and Purpose; 3.4 Antenatal Care; 3.4.1 Routine Antenatal Care
sections.evidence_summary: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

sections.heading: Appendix 1 — Routine Antenatal Screening and Care
sections.evidence_summary: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.

sections.heading: Appendix 2 — Criteria for High-Risk Pregnancies
sections.evidence_summary: Defines conditions that require additional obstetric review and preserves escalation as a clinician decision rather than an automatic workflow output.

evidence_links.direct_relationship: Directly supports routine antenatal identity, gestational context, history, risk reassessment, counselling, patient concerns, care-plan, record, follow-up, and clinician referral documentation.
evidence_links.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

evidence_links.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal movement, fetal heart, fundal height, laboratory, ultrasound, OGTT, counselling, and gestation-linked follow-up fields.
evidence_links.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.

evidence_links.direct_relationship: Supports escalation only as clinician-assessed high-risk referral documentation.
evidence_links.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines conditions that require additional obstetric review and preserves escalation as a clinician decision rather than an automatic workflow output.

unresolved_source_gaps: The baseline includes symptom and red-flag fields not all stated in the reviewed routine sections.
High-risk and complication-specific management remains outside this mapping.
Medication or supplement decisions and fixed clinical interpretations remain unsupported.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.

items.text: no reduced fetal movement reported if applicable
severe swelling of face or hands
investigations discussed as per clinician plan
